parameters.jsCode:
const books = [
  { id: 1,  title: 'Atomic Habits',                                          author: 'James Clear',             genre: 'Desarrollo personal',   year: 2018 },
  { id: 2,  title: '12 Rules for Life',                                      author: 'Jordan B. Peterson',      genre: 'Desarrollo personal',   year: 2018 },
  { id: 3,  title: 'Mindset: The New Psychology of Success',                 author: 'Carol Dweck',             genre: 'Desarrollo personal',   year: 2006 },
  { id: 4,  title: 'The 5 AM Club',                                          author: 'Robin Sharma',            genre: 'Productividad',         year: 2018 },
  { id: 5,  title: 'Can t Hurt Me',                                          author: 'David Goggins',           genre: 'Desarrollo personal',   year: 2018 },
  { id: 6,  title: 'The Compound Effect',                                    author: 'Darren Hardy',            genre: 'Desarrollo personal',   year: 2010 },
  { id: 7,  title: 'The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People',                author: 'Stephen Covey',           genre: 'Desarrollo personal',   year: 1989 },
  { id: 8,  title: 'How to Win Friends and Influence People',                author: 'Dale Carnegie',           genre: 'Habilidades sociales',  year: 1936 },
  { id: 9,  title: 'Man s Search for Meaning',                               author: 'Viktor Frankl',           genre: 'Psicologia',            year: 1946 },
  { id: 10, title: 'The Power of Now',                                       author: 'Eckhart Tolle',           genre: 'Espiritualidad',        year: 1997 },
  { id: 11, title: 'Secrets of the Millionaire Mind',                        author: 'T. Harv Eker',            genre: 'Finanzas personales',   year: 2005 },
  { id: 12, title: 'Rich Dad Poor Dad',                                      author: 'Robert Kiyosaki',         genre: 'Finanzas personales',   year: 1997 },
  { id: 13, title: 'The Psychology of Money',                                author: 'Morgan Housel',           genre: 'Finanzas personales',   year: 2020 },
  { id: 14, title: 'The Total Money Makeover',                               author: 'Dave Ramsey',             genre: 'Finanzas personales',   year: 2003 },
  { id: 15, title: 'The Millionaire Next Door',                              author: 'Thomas J. Stanley',       genre: 'Finanzas personales',   year: 1996 },
  { id: 16, title: 'I Will Teach You to Be Rich',                            author: 'Ramit Sethi',             genre: 'Finanzas personales',   year: 2009 },
  { id: 17, title: 'Building a Second Brain',                                author: 'Tiago Forte',             genre: 'Productividad',         year: 2022 },
  { id: 18, title: 'Deep Work',                                              author: 'Cal Newport',             genre: 'Productividad',         year: 2016 },
  { id: 19, title: 'Getting Things Done',                                    author: 'David Allen',             genre: 'Productividad',         year: 2001 },
  { id: 20, title: 'The ONE Thing',                                          author: 'Gary Keller',             genre: 'Productividad',         year: 2013 },
  { id: 21, title: 'Essentialism: The Disciplined Pursuit of Less',          author: 'Greg McKeown',            genre: 'Productividad',         year: 2014 },
  { id: 22, title: 'The Snowball: Warren Buffett and the Business of Life',  author: 'Alice Schroeder',         genre: 'Biografia / Finanzas',  year: 2008 },
  { id: 23, title: 'The Intelligent Investor',                               author: 'Benjamin Graham',         genre: 'Inversion',             year: 1949 },
  { id: 24, title: 'Poor Charlie s Almanack',                                author: 'Charlie Munger',          genre: 'Inversion / Sabiduria', year: 2005 },
  { id: 25, title: 'Warren Buffett and the Interpretation of Financial Statements', author: 'Mary Buffett', genre: 'Inversion',             year: 2008 },
  { id: 26, title: 'Thinking Fast and Slow',                                 author: 'Daniel Kahneman',         genre: 'Psicologia cognitiva',  year: 2011 },
  { id: 27, title: 'Switch On Your Brain',                                   author: 'Caroline Leaf',           genre: 'Neurociencia',          year: 2013 },
  { id: 28, title: 'Outliers: The Story of Success',                         author: 'Malcolm Gladwell',        genre: 'Psicologia social',     year: 2008 },
  { id: 29, title: 'The Body Keeps the Score',                               author: 'Bessel van der Kolk',     genre: 'Psicologia',            year: 2014 },
  { id: 30, title: 'Influence: The Psychology of Persuasion',                author: 'Robert Cialdini',         genre: 'Psicologia social',     year: 1984 }
];
const idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * books.length);
return [{ json: books[idx] }];
